value:
v1.12.x patch chain for export/import integrity. Origin: 2026-04-09 review found 7 gaps.

SHIPPED:
- v1.12.1 (2026-04-16): #74 auto-backup project scope, #75 encrypted roundtrip. #75 shipped with a STANDALONE --include-encrypted flag rather than waiting for #78's envelope.
- v1.12.2 (2026-04-16, stable promoted after 2-beta soak): #76 single-file export-all (--split preserves legacy 3-file), #77 transactional multi-section imports (new saveAll primitive in src/store.ts), #78 export envelope ($codexcli wrapper with version/type/scope/exportedAt/includesEncrypted/sha256 + bare-shape back-compat), #79 validateImportEntries non-string leaf rejection, #80 import_max_bytes config (default 50 MB) enforced in CLI + MCP, #87 saveAll stamps _meta on import (beta.0→beta.1 fix, prevents [untracked] cascade on restore).

CONVENTION NOTE: original severity-to-patch-number mapping (HIGH→.1, MEDIUM→.2, LOW→.3) bent when .3 was folded into .2. v1.12.0 felt thin so bundling MEDIUM+LOW into a single .2 beat three-patch churn. Situational, not a project rule.

AUDIT COMPLETE: export/import integrity review is fully addressed across v1.12.1 + v1.12.2. Don't re-audit the same area without a new finding. Soak verification on 2026-04-16 confirmed all fixes behave as claimed end-to-end (see #89/#90 for orthogonal bugs surfaced but not in scope).
